comment: Reasons returned by the /api/apply/eligibility endpoint specifically (NOT the broader /api/apply/* surface — preview returns additional shell-response reasons like job_no_longer_available, metadata_unavailable, platform_error which are out of scope for this enum). Backend pytest contract test reads this; frontend imports it via Vite's JSON import at hooks/useApplyEligibility.js. Order matches the precedence in app.py's apply_eligibility function.
